ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the season */,
  "number_of_episodes" INTEGER /* The total number of episodes in the season */,
  "viewership" INTEGER /* The average number of viewers for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_name" TEXT /* Name of the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "episode_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* The episode number within the season */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the episode was filmed */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* The number of participants in the episode */,
  "viewership" INTEGER /* The number of viewers for the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color assigned to the participant */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the participant is part of */,
  "age" INTEGER /* The age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The gender of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* The occupation of the participant */,
  "location" TEXT /* The home location of the participant */,
  "Survival_Skill_Level" TEXT /* The participant's level of survival skills */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the conversation belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who spoke */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the conversation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the conversation */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the conversation */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment expressed during the conversation */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made during the conversation */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* The full transcript of the conversation */,
  "topic" TEXT /* The main topic of the conversation */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Whether the conversation was private */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* The number of participants in the conversation */,
  "emotional_state" TEXT /* The emotional state of the participants during the conversation */,
  "decision_type" TEXT /* The type of decision made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the survival item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survival item */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the survival item */,
  "importance_level" TEXT /* The importance level of the item */,
  "availability" TEXT /* The availability of the item during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversation_items" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survival item */,
  "mentioned" INTEGER /* Whether the item was mentioned during the conversation */,
  "mention_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the item was mentioned */,
  "mention_context" TEXT /* The context in which the item was mentioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id", "item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "private_conversations" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Whether the conversation was private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, researcher, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* The specific permissions granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
